name: quick actions replace stale location after departure

source.purpose: Regression from 260430 Playthrough SO Pursuit: after the ship departed, quick actions offered concourse/clamp/departure-window choices. Repair must replace those with shipboard actions before they reach the UI.

currentLocation.name: Meridian deep passage
currentLocation.description: Meridian has departed Sable Reach and burned clear into open corridor space.

location.name: Meridian deep passage
location.description: Meridian has departed Sable Reach and burned clear into open corridor space.

established: Trajectory locks toward deep corridor passages.

sceneSummaries.summary: Meridian burned clear of Sable Reach and achieved trajectory beyond station pursuit intercept margins.

inputActions: Go to the concourse and find Sera Oln. [Persuasion]
Push the Meridian's departure hard before the clamps lock again.
Ask Tatch whether Kess is reachable at current fuel.
Wait for the inspectors to arrive.
outputActionsInclude: Ask Tatch whether Kess is reachable at current fuel.
Check the ship's current position and immediate options from the bridge.
Talk to the on-board crew about the next constraint.
outputActionsExclude: Go to the concourse and find Sera Oln. [Persuasion]
Push the Meridian's departure hard before the clamps lock again.
Wait for the inspectors to arrive.
notesInclude: replaced stale-location quick action after departure
